revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing programmatically created pages and categories

revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Infobox pharaoh/doc]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Infobox pharaoh/doc]][[Category:bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Infobox pharaoh/doc]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Infobox pharaoh/doc]][[Category:qq]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[en:Template:Infobox pharaoh/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Infobox pharaoh/doc]][[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

#redirect[[:en:Template:Infobox pharaoh/doc]] [[Category:11]][[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Infobox pharaoh/doc]][[Category:11]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]
#redirect[[:en:Template:Infobox pharaoh/doc]] [[sn::Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]][[en:Infobox pharaoh/doc]][[sn::bump February 13, 2025 bump]]

{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} {{Generic template demo |name |alt_name |image |image_alt=
{{{image_alt}}} |caption |role={{{role{{!}}[[Pharaoh]]}}} |reign |dynasty |coregency |predecessor |successor |titulary_notes |prenomen |prenomen_hiero |nomen |nomen_hiero |horus |horus_hiero |nebty |nebty_hiero |golden |golden_hiero |consorts={{longitem|{{{consorts}}}{{\}}{{{spouses}}}{{\}}{{{consort}}}{{\}}{{{spouse}}}}} |children |father |mother |birth_date | birth_place |death_date | death_place |burial |monuments }} == Usage == This template is designed to display information about an Egyptian pharaoh, including [[Ancient Egyptian royal titulary|their names]] in hieroglyphs. Other than ''name'', all parameters listed below are optional. To see a near-full example of the template's use within the encyclopedia, visit [[Thutmose III]]. ===Full syntax=== {{Infobox pharaoh | name = | alt_name = | image = | image_alt = | caption = | role = | reign = | coregency = | predecessor = | successor = | notes = | prenomen = | prenomen_hiero = | nomen = | nomen_hiero = | horus = | horus_prefix = | horus_hiero = | nebty = | nebty_hiero = | golden = | golden_hiero = | spouse = | children = | dynasty = | father = | mother = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial = | monuments = | module = }} ===Parameters=== All optional other than ''name''. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Function |- | name || Name by which pharaoh commonly known |- | alt_name || Alternative names |- | image || Infobox image (headshot, if possible) |- | image_alt || Alternative text for the image |- | caption || Caption for the image |- | align || Template's position: left, center or right |- | nomen || Pharaoh's nomen; use {{tag|hiero}} format, followed by transliteration, followed by translation |- | prenomen || Pharaoh's prenomen (see above) |- | golden || Pharaoh's Golden Horus name |- | nebty || Pharaoh's Nebty name |- | horus || Pharaoh's Horus |- | reign || Dates of pharaoh's reign (use alternatives, if known) |- | predecessor || Name of pharaoh's predecessor |- | successor || Name of pharaoh's successor |- | consorts or consort
spouses or spouse || Names of pharaoh's consorts/spouses |- | children || Names of pharaoh's children |- | dynasty || Name of pharaoh's dynasty |- | coregency || [[coregency]] (if applicable) |- | father || Name of pharah's father (if known) |- | mother || Name of pharah's mother (if known) |- | birth_date || Year of pharaoh's birth |- | birth_place || Place of pharaoh's birth (if known) |- | death_date || Year of pharaoh's death |- | death_place || Place of pharaoh's death (if known) |- | burial || Place where pharaoh buried and/or pharaoh's tomb/body found |- | monuments || Names of any significant monuments dedicated to the pharaoh |- | role || Defaults to "[[Pharaoh]]" |- | golden_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Golden Horus name (see above) |- | nebty_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Nebty name (see above) |- | horus_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Horus (see above) |- | module || ''optional'' – Embedded template |} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox pharaoh with unknown parameters}} {{Ancient Egypt template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates|Pharaoh]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} {{Generic template demo |name |alt_name |image |image_alt=
{{{image_alt}}} |caption |role={{{role{{!}}[[Pharaoh]]}}} |reign |dynasty |coregency |predecessor |successor |titulary_notes |prenomen |prenomen_hiero |nomen |nomen_hiero |horus |horus_hiero |nebty |nebty_hiero |golden |golden_hiero |consorts={{longitem|{{{consorts}}}{{\}}{{{spouses}}}{{\}}{{{consort}}}{{\}}{{{spouse}}}}} |children |father |mother |birth_date | birth_place |death_date | death_place |burial |monuments }} == Usage == This template is designed to display information about an Egyptian pharaoh, including [[:en:Ancient Egyptian royal titulary|their names]] in hieroglyphs. Other than ''name'', all parameters listed below are optional. To see a near-full example of the template's use within the encyclopedia, visit [[Thutmose III]]. ===Full syntax=== {{Infobox pharaoh | name = | alt_name = | image = | image_alt = | caption = | role = | reign = | coregency = | predecessor = | successor = | notes = | prenomen = | prenomen_hiero = | nomen = | nomen_hiero = | horus = | horus_prefix = | horus_hiero = | nebty = | nebty_hiero = | golden = | golden_hiero = | spouse = | children = | dynasty = | father = | mother = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial = | monuments = | module = }} ===Parameters=== All optional other than ''name''. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Function |- | name || Name by which pharaoh commonly known |- | alt_name || Alternative names |- | image || Infobox image (headshot, if possible) |- | image_alt || Alternative text for the image |- | caption || Caption for the image |- | align || Template's position: left, center or right |- | nomen || Pharaoh's nomen; use {{tag|hiero}} format, followed by transliteration, followed by translation |- | prenomen || Pharaoh's prenomen (see above) |- | golden || Pharaoh's Golden Horus name |- | nebty || Pharaoh's Nebty name |- | horus || Pharaoh's Horus |- | reign || Dates of pharaoh's reign (use alternatives, if known) |- | predecessor || Name of pharaoh's predecessor |- | successor || Name of pharaoh's successor |- | consorts or consort
spouses or spouse || Names of pharaoh's consorts/spouses |- | children || Names of pharaoh's children |- | dynasty || Name of pharaoh's dynasty |- | coregency || [[coregency]] (if applicable) |- | father || Name of pharah's father (if known) |- | mother || Name of pharah's mother (if known) |- | birth_date || Year of pharaoh's birth |- | birth_place || Place of pharaoh's birth (if known) |- | death_date || Year of pharaoh's death |- | death_place || Place of pharaoh's death (if known) |- | burial || Place where pharaoh buried and/or pharaoh's tomb/body found |- | monuments || Names of any significant monuments dedicated to the pharaoh |- | role || Defaults to "[[Pharaoh]]" |- | golden_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Golden Horus name (see above) |- | nebty_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Nebty name (see above) |- | horus_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Horus (see above) |- | module || ''optional'' – Embedded template |} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox pharaoh with unknown parameters}} {{Ancient Egypt template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates|Pharaoh]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} {{Generic template demo |name |alt_name |image |image_alt=
{{{image_alt}}} |caption |role={{{role{{!}}[[Pharaoh]]}}} |reign |dynasty |coregency |predecessor |successor |titulary_notes |prenomen |prenomen_hiero |nomen |nomen_hiero |horus |horus_hiero |nebty |nebty_hiero |golden |golden_hiero |consorts={{longitem|{{{consorts}}}{{\}}{{{spouses}}}{{\}}{{{consort}}}{{\}}{{{spouse}}}}} |children |father |mother |birth_date | birth_place |death_date | death_place |burial |monuments }} == Usage == This template is designed to display information about an Egyptian pharaoh, including [[:en:Ancient Egyptian royal titulary|their names]] in hieroglyphs. Other than ''name'', all parameters listed below are optional. To see a near-full example of the template's use within the encyclopedia, visit [[Thutmose III]]. ===Full syntax=== {{Infobox pharaoh | name = | alt_name = | image = | image_alt = | caption = | role = | reign = | coregency = | predecessor = | successor = | notes = | prenomen = | prenomen_hiero = | nomen = | nomen_hiero = | horus = | horus_prefix = | horus_hiero = | nebty = | nebty_hiero = | golden = | golden_hiero = | spouse = | children = | dynasty = | father = | mother = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial = | monuments = | module = }} ===Parameters=== All optional other than ''name''. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Function |- | name || Name by which pharaoh commonly known |- | alt_name || Alternative names |- | image || Infobox image (headshot, if possible) |- | image_alt || Alternative text for the image |- | caption || Caption for the image |- | align || Template's position: left, center or right |- | nomen || Pharaoh's nomen; use {{tag|hiero}} format, followed by transliteration, followed by translation |- | prenomen || Pharaoh's prenomen (see above) |- | golden || Pharaoh's Golden Horus name |- | nebty || Pharaoh's Nebty name |- | horus || Pharaoh's Horus |- | reign || Dates of pharaoh's reign (use alternatives, if known) |- | predecessor || Name of pharaoh's predecessor |- | successor || Name of pharaoh's successor |- | consorts or consort
spouses or spouse || Names of pharaoh's consorts/spouses |- | children || Names of pharaoh's children |- | dynasty || Name of pharaoh's dynasty |- | coregency || [[:en:Coregency|Coregency]] (if applicable) |- | father || Name of pharah's father (if known) |- | mother || Name of pharah's mother (if known) |- | birth_date || Year of pharaoh's birth |- | birth_place || Place of pharaoh's birth (if known) |- | death_date || Year of pharaoh's death |- | death_place || Place of pharaoh's death (if known) |- | burial || Place where pharaoh buried and/or pharaoh's tomb/body found |- | monuments || Names of any significant monuments dedicated to the pharaoh |- | role || Defaults to "[[Pharaoh]]" |- | golden_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Golden Horus name (see above) |- | nebty_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Nebty name (see above) |- | horus_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Horus (see above) |- | module || ''optional'' – Embedded template |} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox pharaoh with unknown parameters}} {{Ancient Egypt template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates|Pharaoh]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} {{Generic template demo |name |alt_name |image |image_alt=
{{{image_alt}}} |caption |role={{{role{{!}}[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]}}} |reign |dynasty |coregency |predecessor |successor |titulary_notes |prenomen |prenomen_hiero |nomen |nomen_hiero |horus |horus_hiero |nebty |nebty_hiero |golden |golden_hiero |consorts={{longitem|{{{consorts}}}{{\}}{{{spouses}}}{{\}}{{{consort}}}{{\}}{{{spouse}}}}} |children |father |mother |birth_date | birth_place |death_date | death_place |burial |monuments }} == Usage == This template is designed to display information about an Egyptian pharaoh, including [[:en:Ancient Egyptian royal titulary|their names]] in hieroglyphs. Other than ''name'', all parameters listed below are optional. To see a near-full example of the template's use within the encyclopedia, visit [[Thutmose III]]. ===Full syntax=== {{Infobox pharaoh | name = | alt_name = | image = | image_alt = | caption = | role = | reign = | coregency = | predecessor = | successor = | notes = | prenomen = | prenomen_hiero = | nomen = | nomen_hiero = | horus = | horus_prefix = | horus_hiero = | nebty = | nebty_hiero = | golden = | golden_hiero = | spouse = | children = | dynasty = | father = | mother = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial = | monuments = | module = }} ===Parameters=== All optional other than ''name''. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Function |- | name || Name by which pharaoh commonly known |- | alt_name || Alternative names |- | image || Infobox image (headshot, if possible) |- | image_alt || Alternative text for the image |- | caption || Caption for the image |- | align || Template's position: left, center or right |- | nomen || Pharaoh's nomen; use {{tag|hiero}} format, followed by transliteration, followed by translation |- | prenomen || Pharaoh's prenomen (see above) |- | golden || Pharaoh's Golden Horus name |- | nebty || Pharaoh's Nebty name |- | horus || Pharaoh's Horus |- | reign || Dates of pharaoh's reign (use alternatives, if known) |- | predecessor || Name of pharaoh's predecessor |- | successor || Name of pharaoh's successor |- | consorts or consort
spouses or spouse || Names of pharaoh's consorts/spouses |- | children || Names of pharaoh's children |- | dynasty || Name of pharaoh's dynasty |- | coregency || [[:en:Coregency|Coregency]] (if applicable) |- | father || Name of pharah's father (if known) |- | mother || Name of pharah's mother (if known) |- | birth_date || Year of pharaoh's birth |- | birth_place || Place of pharaoh's birth (if known) |- | death_date || Year of pharaoh's death |- | death_place || Place of pharaoh's death (if known) |- | burial || Place where pharaoh buried and/or pharaoh's tomb/body found |- | monuments || Names of any significant monuments dedicated to the pharaoh |- | role || Defaults to "[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]" |- | golden_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Golden Horus name (see above) |- | nebty_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Nebty name (see above) |- | horus_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Horus (see above) |- | module || ''optional'' – Embedded template |} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox pharaoh with unknown parameters}} {{Ancient Egypt template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates|Pharaoh]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: convert local link → enwiki interwiki
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} {{Generic template demo |name |alt_name |image |image_alt=
{{{image_alt}}} |caption |role={{{role{{!}}[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]}}} |reign |dynasty |coregency |predecessor |successor |titulary_notes |prenomen |prenomen_hiero |nomen |nomen_hiero |horus |horus_hiero |nebty |nebty_hiero |golden |golden_hiero |consorts={{longitem|{{{consorts}}}{{\}}{{{spouses}}}{{\}}{{{consort}}}{{\}}{{{spouse}}}}} |children |father |mother |birth_date | birth_place |death_date | death_place |burial |monuments }} == Usage == This template is designed to display information about an Egyptian pharaoh, including [[:en:Ancient Egyptian royal titulary|their names]] in hieroglyphs. Other than ''name'', all parameters listed below are optional. To see a near-full example of the template's use within the encyclopedia, visit [[:en:Thutmose III|Thutmose III]]. ===Full syntax=== {{Infobox pharaoh | name = | alt_name = | image = | image_alt = | caption = | role = | reign = | coregency = | predecessor = | successor = | notes = | prenomen = | prenomen_hiero = | nomen = | nomen_hiero = | horus = | horus_prefix = | horus_hiero = | nebty = | nebty_hiero = | golden = | golden_hiero = | spouse = | children = | dynasty = | father = | mother = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial = | monuments = | module = }} ===Parameters=== All optional other than ''name''. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Function |- | name || Name by which pharaoh commonly known |- | alt_name || Alternative names |- | image || Infobox image (headshot, if possible) |- | image_alt || Alternative text for the image |- | caption || Caption for the image |- | align || Template's position: left, center or right |- | nomen || Pharaoh's nomen; use {{tag|hiero}} format, followed by transliteration, followed by translation |- | prenomen || Pharaoh's prenomen (see above) |- | golden || Pharaoh's Golden Horus name |- | nebty || Pharaoh's Nebty name |- | horus || Pharaoh's Horus |- | reign || Dates of pharaoh's reign (use alternatives, if known) |- | predecessor || Name of pharaoh's predecessor |- | successor || Name of pharaoh's successor |- | consorts or consort
spouses or spouse || Names of pharaoh's consorts/spouses |- | children || Names of pharaoh's children |- | dynasty || Name of pharaoh's dynasty |- | coregency || [[:en:Coregency|Coregency]] (if applicable) |- | father || Name of pharah's father (if known) |- | mother || Name of pharah's mother (if known) |- | birth_date || Year of pharaoh's birth |- | birth_place || Place of pharaoh's birth (if known) |- | death_date || Year of pharaoh's death |- | death_place || Place of pharaoh's death (if known) |- | burial || Place where pharaoh buried and/or pharaoh's tomb/body found |- | monuments || Names of any significant monuments dedicated to the pharaoh |- | role || Defaults to "[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]" |- | golden_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Golden Horus name (see above) |- | nebty_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Nebty name (see above) |- | horus_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Horus (see above) |- | module || ''optional'' – Embedded template |} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox pharaoh with unknown parameters}} {{Ancient Egypt template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates|Pharaoh]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} {{Generic template demo |name |alt_name |image |image_alt=
{{{image_alt}}} |caption |role={{{role{{!}}[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]}}} |reign |dynasty |coregency |predecessor |successor |titulary_notes |prenomen |prenomen_hiero |nomen |nomen_hiero |horus |horus_hiero |nebty |nebty_hiero |golden |golden_hiero |consorts={{longitem|{{{consorts}}}{{\}}{{{spouses}}}{{\}}{{{consort}}}{{\}}{{{spouse}}}}} |children |father |mother |birth_date | birth_place |death_date | death_place |burial |monuments }} == Usage == This template is designed to display information about an Egyptian pharaoh, including [[:en:Ancient Egyptian royal titulary|their names]] in hieroglyphs. Other than ''name'', all parameters listed below are optional. To see a near-full example of the template's use within the encyclopedia, visit [[:en:Thutmose III|Thutmose III]]. ===Full syntax=== {{Infobox pharaoh | name = | alt_name = | image = | image_alt = | caption = | role = | reign = | coregency = | predecessor = | successor = | notes = | prenomen = | prenomen_hiero = | nomen = | nomen_hiero = | horus = | horus_prefix = | horus_hiero = | nebty = | nebty_hiero = | golden = | golden_hiero = | spouse = | children = | dynasty = | father = | mother = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial = | monuments = | module = }} ===Parameters=== All optional other than ''name''. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Function |- | name || Name by which pharaoh commonly known |- | alt_name || Alternative names |- | image || Infobox image (headshot, if possible) |- | image_alt || Alternative text for the image |- | caption || Caption for the image |- | align || Template's position: left, center or right |- | nomen || Pharaoh's nomen; use {{tag|hiero}} format, followed by transliteration, followed by translation |- | prenomen || Pharaoh's prenomen (see above) |- | golden || Pharaoh's Golden Horus name |- | nebty || Pharaoh's Nebty name |- | horus || Pharaoh's Horus |- | reign || Dates of pharaoh's reign (use alternatives, if known) |- | predecessor || Name of pharaoh's predecessor |- | successor || Name of pharaoh's successor |- | consorts or consort
spouses or spouse || Names of pharaoh's consorts/spouses |- | children || Names of pharaoh's children |- | dynasty || Name of pharaoh's dynasty |- | coregency || [[:en:Coregency|Coregency]] (if applicable) |- | father || Name of pharah's father (if known) |- | mother || Name of pharah's mother (if known) |- | birth_date || Year of pharaoh's birth |- | birth_place || Place of pharaoh's birth (if known) |- | death_date || Year of pharaoh's death |- | death_place || Place of pharaoh's death (if known) |- | burial || Place where pharaoh buried and/or pharaoh's tomb/body found |- | monuments || Names of any significant monuments dedicated to the pharaoh |- | role || Defaults to "[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]" |- | golden_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Golden Horus name (see above) |- | nebty_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Nebty name (see above) |- | horus_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Horus (see above) |- | module || ''optional'' – Embedded template |} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox pharaoh with unknown parameters}} {{Ancient Egypt template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates|Pharaoh]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} {{Generic template demo |name |alt_name |image |image_alt=
{{{image_alt}}} |caption |role={{{role{{!}}[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]}}} |reign |dynasty |coregency |predecessor |successor |titulary_notes |prenomen |prenomen_hiero |nomen |nomen_hiero |horus |horus_hiero |nebty |nebty_hiero |golden |golden_hiero |consorts={{longitem|{{{consorts}}}{{\}}{{{spouses}}}{{\}}{{{consort}}}{{\}}{{{spouse}}}}} |children |father |mother |birth_date | birth_place |death_date | death_place |burial |monuments }} == Usage == This template is designed to display information about an Egyptian pharaoh, including [[:en:Ancient Egyptian royal titulary|their names]] in hieroglyphs. Other than ''name'', all parameters listed below are optional. To see a near-full example of the template's use within the encyclopedia, visit [[:en:Thutmose III|Thutmose III]]. ===Full syntax=== {{Infobox pharaoh | name = | alt_name = | image = | image_alt = | caption = | role = | reign = | coregency = | predecessor = | successor = | notes = | prenomen = | prenomen_hiero = | nomen = | nomen_hiero = | horus = | horus_prefix = | horus_hiero = | nebty = | nebty_hiero = | golden = | golden_hiero = | spouse = | children = | dynasty = | father = | mother = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial = | monuments = | module = }} ===Parameters=== All optional other than ''name''. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Function |- | name || Name by which pharaoh commonly known |- | alt_name || Alternative names |- | image || Infobox image (headshot, if possible) |- | image_alt || Alternative text for the image |- | caption || Caption for the image |- | align || Template's position: left, center or right |- | nomen || Pharaoh's nomen; use {{tag|hiero}} format, followed by transliteration, followed by translation |- | prenomen || Pharaoh's prenomen (see above) |- | golden || Pharaoh's Golden Horus name |- | nebty || Pharaoh's Nebty name |- | horus || Pharaoh's Horus |- | reign || Dates of pharaoh's reign (use alternatives, if known) |- | predecessor || Name of pharaoh's predecessor |- | successor || Name of pharaoh's successor |- | consorts or consort
spouses or spouse || Names of pharaoh's consorts/spouses |- | children || Names of pharaoh's children |- | dynasty || Name of pharaoh's dynasty |- | coregency || [[:en:Coregency|Coregency]] (if applicable) |- | father || Name of pharah's father (if known) |- | mother || Name of pharah's mother (if known) |- | birth_date || Year of pharaoh's birth |- | birth_place || Place of pharaoh's birth (if known) |- | death_date || Year of pharaoh's death |- | death_place || Place of pharaoh's death (if known) |- | burial || Place where pharaoh buried and/or pharaoh's tomb/body found |- | monuments || Names of any significant monuments dedicated to the pharaoh |- | role || Defaults to "[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]" |- | golden_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Golden Horus name (see above) |- | nebty_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Nebty name (see above) |- | horus_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Horus (see above) |- | module || ''optional'' – Embedded template |} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox pharaoh with unknown parameters}} {{Ancient Egypt template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates|Pharaoh]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} {{Generic template demo |name |alt_name |image |image_alt=
{{{image_alt}}} |caption |role={{{role{{!}}[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]}}} |reign |dynasty |coregency |predecessor |successor |titulary_notes |prenomen |prenomen_hiero |nomen |nomen_hiero |horus |horus_hiero |nebty |nebty_hiero |golden |golden_hiero |consorts={{longitem|{{{consorts}}}{{\}}{{{spouses}}}{{\}}{{{consort}}}{{\}}{{{spouse}}}}} |children |father |mother |birth_date | birth_place |death_date | death_place |burial |monuments }} == Usage == This template is designed to display information about an Egyptian pharaoh, including [[:en:Ancient Egyptian royal titulary|their names]] in hieroglyphs. Other than ''name'', all parameters listed below are optional. To see a near-full example of the template's use within the encyclopedia, visit [[:en:Thutmose III|Thutmose III]]. ===Full syntax=== {{Infobox pharaoh | name = | alt_name = | image = | image_alt = | caption = | role = | reign = | coregency = | predecessor = | successor = | notes = | prenomen = | prenomen_hiero = | nomen = | nomen_hiero = | horus = | horus_prefix = | horus_hiero = | nebty = | nebty_hiero = | golden = | golden_hiero = | spouse = | children = | dynasty = | father = | mother = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial = | monuments = | module = }} ===Parameters=== All optional other than ''name''. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Function |- | name || Name by which pharaoh commonly known |- | alt_name || Alternative names |- | image || Infobox image (headshot, if possible) |- | image_alt || Alternative text for the image |- | caption || Caption for the image |- | align || Template's position: left, center or right |- | nomen || Pharaoh's nomen; use {{tag|hiero}} format, followed by transliteration, followed by translation |- | prenomen || Pharaoh's prenomen (see above) |- | golden || Pharaoh's Golden Horus name |- | nebty || Pharaoh's Nebty name |- | horus || Pharaoh's Horus |- | reign || Dates of pharaoh's reign (use alternatives, if known) |- | predecessor || Name of pharaoh's predecessor |- | successor || Name of pharaoh's successor |- | consorts or consort
spouses or spouse || Names of pharaoh's consorts/spouses |- | children || Names of pharaoh's children |- | dynasty || Name of pharaoh's dynasty |- | coregency || [[:en:Coregency|Coregency]] (if applicable) |- | father || Name of pharah's father (if known) |- | mother || Name of pharah's mother (if known) |- | birth_date || Year of pharaoh's birth |- | birth_place || Place of pharaoh's birth (if known) |- | death_date || Year of pharaoh's death |- | death_place || Place of pharaoh's death (if known) |- | burial || Place where pharaoh buried and/or pharaoh's tomb/body found |- | monuments || Names of any significant monuments dedicated to the pharaoh |- | role || Defaults to "[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]" |- | golden_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Golden Horus name (see above) |- | nebty_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Nebty name (see above) |- | horus_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Horus (see above) |- | module || ''optional'' – Embedded template |} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox pharaoh with unknown parameters}} {{Ancient Egypt template list}} {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates|Pharaoh]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23462003564|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} {{Generic template demo |name |alt_name |image |image_alt=
{{{image_alt}}} |caption |role={{{role{{!}}[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]}}} |reign |dynasty |coregency |predecessor |successor |titulary_notes |prenomen |prenomen_hiero |nomen |nomen_hiero |horus |horus_hiero |nebty |nebty_hiero |golden |golden_hiero |consorts={{longitem|{{{consorts}}}{{\}}{{{spouses}}}{{\}}{{{consort}}}{{\}}{{{spouse}}}}} |children |father |mother |birth_date | birth_place |death_date | death_place |burial |monuments }} == Usage == This template is designed to display information about an Egyptian pharaoh, including [[:en:Ancient Egyptian royal titulary|their names]] in hieroglyphs. Other than ''name'', all parameters listed below are optional. To see a near-full example of the template's use within the encyclopedia, visit [[:en:Thutmose III|Thutmose III]]. ===Full syntax=== {{Infobox pharaoh | name = | alt_name = | image = | image_alt = | caption = | role = | reign = | coregency = | predecessor = | successor = | notes = | prenomen = | prenomen_hiero = | nomen = | nomen_hiero = | horus = | horus_prefix = | horus_hiero = | nebty = | nebty_hiero = | golden = | golden_hiero = | spouse = | children = | dynasty = | father = | mother = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial = | monuments = | module = }} ===Parameters=== All optional other than ''name''. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Function |- | name || Name by which pharaoh commonly known |- | alt_name || Alternative names |- | image || Infobox image (headshot, if possible) |- | image_alt || Alternative text for the image |- | caption || Caption for the image |- | align || Template's position: left, center or right |- | nomen || Pharaoh's nomen; use {{tag|hiero}} format, followed by transliteration, followed by translation |- | prenomen || Pharaoh's prenomen (see above) |- | golden || Pharaoh's Golden Horus name |- | nebty || Pharaoh's Nebty name |- | horus || Pharaoh's Horus |- | reign || Dates of pharaoh's reign (use alternatives, if known) |- | predecessor || Name of pharaoh's predecessor |- | successor || Name of pharaoh's successor |- | consorts or consort
spouses or spouse || Names of pharaoh's consorts/spouses |- | children || Names of pharaoh's children |- | dynasty || Name of pharaoh's dynasty |- | coregency || [[:en:Coregency|Coregency]] (if applicable) |- | father || Name of pharah's father (if known) |- | mother || Name of pharah's mother (if known) |- | birth_date || Year of pharaoh's birth |- | birth_place || Place of pharaoh's birth (if known) |- | death_date || Year of pharaoh's death |- | death_place || Place of pharaoh's death (if known) |- | burial || Place where pharaoh buried and/or pharaoh's tomb/body found |- | monuments || Names of any significant monuments dedicated to the pharaoh |- | role || Defaults to "[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]" |- | golden_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Golden Horus name (see above) |- | nebty_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Nebty name (see above) |- | horus_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Horus (see above) |- | module || ''optional'' – Embedded template |} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox pharaoh with unknown parameters}} {{Ancient Egypt template list}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates|Pharaoh]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24945162515|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Check for unknown parameters}} {{Generic template demo |name |alt_name |image |image_alt=
{{{image_alt}}} |caption |role={{{role{{!}}[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]}}} |reign |dynasty |coregency |predecessor |successor |titulary_notes |prenomen |prenomen_hiero |nomen |nomen_hiero |horus |horus_hiero |nebty |nebty_hiero |golden |golden_hiero |consorts={{longitem|{{{consorts}}}{{\}}{{{spouses}}}{{\}}{{{consort}}}{{\}}{{{spouse}}}}} |children |father |mother |birth_date | birth_place |death_date | death_place |burial |monuments }} == Usage == This template is designed to display information about an Egyptian pharaoh, including [[:en:Ancient Egyptian royal titulary|their names]] in hieroglyphs. Other than ''name'', all parameters listed below are optional. To see a near-full example of the template's use within the encyclopedia, visit [[:en:Thutmose III|Thutmose III]]. ===Full syntax=== {{Infobox pharaoh | name = | alt_name = | image = | image_alt = | caption = | role = | reign = | coregency = | predecessor = | successor = | notes = | prenomen = | prenomen_hiero = | nomen = | nomen_hiero = | horus = | horus_prefix = | horus_hiero = | nebty = | nebty_hiero = | golden = | golden_hiero = | spouse = | children = | dynasty = | father = | mother = | birth_date = | birth_place = | death_date = | death_place = | burial = | monuments = | module = }} ===Parameters=== All optional other than ''name''. {| class="wikitable" |- ! Parameter !! Function |- | name || Name by which pharaoh commonly known |- | alt_name || Alternative names |- | image || Infobox image (headshot, if possible) |- | image_alt || Alternative text for the image |- | caption || Caption for the image |- | align || Template's position: left, center or right |- | nomen || Pharaoh's nomen; use {{tag|hiero}} format, followed by transliteration, followed by translation |- | prenomen || Pharaoh's prenomen (see above) |- | golden || Pharaoh's Golden Horus name |- | nebty || Pharaoh's Nebty name |- | horus || Pharaoh's Horus |- | reign || Dates of pharaoh's reign (use alternatives, if known) |- | predecessor || Name of pharaoh's predecessor |- | successor || Name of pharaoh's successor |- | consorts or consort
spouses or spouse || Names of pharaoh's consorts/spouses |- | children || Names of pharaoh's children |- | dynasty || Name of pharaoh's dynasty |- | coregency || [[:en:Coregency|Coregency]] (if applicable) |- | father || Name of pharah's father (if known) |- | mother || Name of pharah's mother (if known) |- | birth_date || Year of pharaoh's birth |- | birth_place || Place of pharaoh's birth (if known) |- | death_date || Year of pharaoh's death |- | death_place || Place of pharaoh's death (if known) |- | burial || Place where pharaoh buried and/or pharaoh's tomb/body found |- | monuments || Names of any significant monuments dedicated to the pharaoh |- | role || Defaults to "[[:en:Pharaoh|Pharaoh]]" |- | golden_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Golden Horus name (see above) |- | nebty_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Nebty name (see above) |- | horus_hiero || Pharaoh's hieroglyphic Horus (see above) |- | module || ''optional'' – Embedded template |} == Microformat == {{UF-hcard-person}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox pharaoh with unknown parameters}} {{Ancient Egypt template list}} {{Sandbox other|| }} [[Category:Royalty and nobility infobox templates|Pharaoh]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
